2008October 27, 2008

🇰🇷 Busan, Korea

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Busan, Korea, October 27, 2008 -- November 7, 2008

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2008-11-busan-korea

16 Resolutions

766Plenary
Submit procedures for standards as databases for ballot
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to submit the operating procedures described in SC 4 N2407 for a two-month committee internal ballot. Any negative votes must be accompanied by comments.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
765Plenary
Direct WG 13 to draft ISO 8000 scope and plan
SC 4 directs WG 13 to deliver a brief (1-3 page) draft scope statement and phased delivery plan for ISO 8000 as a whole, and a definition of other standardization requirements both inside and outsi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
764Plenary
Create Ad Hoc Group for Gellish-RDF
SC 4 creates an Ad Hoc Group for Gellish-RDF with project leader Paul van Exel and editor Leo van Ruijven. The group is requested to clarify the position of the proposed standard with respect to SC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
763Plenary
Submit ISO 10303 parts as minor revisions
SC 4 directs WG 12 to prepare FDIS documents for ISO 10303-47, 503, 504, 506, 517, 518, 519, 521, and 523 and submit them to ISO for processing as minor revisions. This amendment has been supersede...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
762Plenary
Extend submission dates for ISO 10303-52, 53, and 110
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to inform ISO that the target dates for the submission of 10303 parts -52, -53 and -110 for DIS ballot are extended to 2009-01-30, and that these parts should not be a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
761Plenary
Appoint SC 4 delegates to ISO 22274 project
For the improvement of communication and active participation in the project ISO 22274, ”Systems to Manage Terminology, Knowledge and Content -- Internationalization and Concepts -- Related Aspects...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
760Plenary
Direct Visualization ad hoc group to complete format assessment
In acknowledgement of this effort, SC 4 directs the 3D Visualization ad hoc group to complete the assessment of the candidates and provide the summary report no later than 2009-03-31.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
759Plenary
Cancel project ISO 10303-229 due to lack of resources
SC 4 requests its Secretary to inform ISO CS of the cancellation of the project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
758Plenary
Manage ISO 10303 application modules under part 1000 and adopt N2402
SC 4 resolves to manage the ISO 10303 application modules in the 400 and 1000 series using the ISO Procedures for the Management of standards as databases.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
757Plenary
Register Usage Guide for ISO 10303-214 as TS and circulate for ballot
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 decides to register the project “Usage Guide for ISO 10303-214 for gear units” as a separate ISO project, to be published as a TS. The project team is requested to work with WG 3, W...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
756Plenary
Appoint liaison representatives to ISO/TC 154
SC 4 appoints Mr. Peter Benson, Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes and Dr. Ricardo Goncalves as its liaison officers to ISO/TC 154.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
755Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-241 Module 1388-1395 |Tatsuo Terai; Seong-Sig Kim |Tats...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks our SC 4 short report presenters at the Opening Plenary: * ISO TC 37: Dr. Gerry Radack We appreciate your representation to and for ISO TC 184/SC 4.

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
